title: Proper application of sunscreen: How much to apply - Canada.ca
content:
## Proper application of sunscreen: How much to apply
With described video

## Transcript - Proper application of sunscreen: How much to apply
A cartoon image of the sun appears on screen.
Text on Screen: Sun Screen Tips
A cartoon image of a woman appears on screen. She is at the beach and wearing a bathing suit.
Text on Screen: For an adult use about 7 teaspoons or 35 millilitres for the entire body.
1 teaspoon for the face and neck
1 teaspoon for each arm
1 teaspoon for each leg
1 teaspoon for the front of your torso and
1 teaspoon for your back
Text on screen: Canada.ca/sun-safety
